introSection: Voltigo is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Gosetto currently located at Dennlys Parc in Dennebroeucq, Hauts-de-France, France.
fullText: Voltigo is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Gosetto currently located at Dennlys Parc in Dennebroeucq, Hauts-de-France, France.
